title: State of the Arts Project
text: Alkhidmat Foundation Pakistan is one of the leading, non-profit organization, fully dedicated to humanitarian services since 1990. Alkhidmat's workers and volunteers continue to work tirelessly.

projects.title: Aghosh College Murree
projects.desc: Empowering orphans with top-tier education in a serene and secure residential environment nestled in the hills of Murree.

projects.title: Alkhidmat Hospital Tharparkar
projects.desc: Delivering quality healthcare to remote communities in Tharparkar—equipped with modern facilities and compassionate care.

projects.title: Mobile Health Unit
projects.desc: Healthcare on wheels—reaching underserved areas with essential medical services, diagnostics, and emergency care.

projects.title: Submersible Water Pump
projects.desc: Providing deep water access to drought-hit regions—ensuring clean, safe drinking water for families in need.

projects.title: Submersible Water Pump 1
projects.desc: Providing deep water access to drought-hit regions—ensuring clean, safe drinking water for families in need.
